import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"
import json, io, sys, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics
with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)[:0]
quran[0] if isinstance(quran, list) else list(quran.keys())[:5]

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)
len(hadiths), hadiths[0].keys()

import re, unicodedata, string, difflib, math

AR_DIAC = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[\u0600-\u0605\u061B\u061F\u066A-\u066D\.\,\:\;\!\?\{\}\[\]\(\)\"\'\«\»\—\–\-…]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None: return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = AR_DIAC.sub('', s)
    s = PUNCT.sub(' ', s)
    # unify alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    # remove extra spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def normalize_light(s):
    # Keep hamza seats but remove diacritics
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = AR_DIAC.sub('', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig_full = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
norm_full = normalize_ar(orig_full)
norm_light = normalize_light(orig_full)
orig_full, norm_full, norm_light

matches = []
for v in quran:
    ayah = v['ayah_text']
    n = normalize_ar(ayah)
    nl = normalize_light(ayah)
    if norm_full in n or norm_light in nl:
        matches.append((v, ayah, n, nl))
len(matches)

phrase = normalize_ar("خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ")
phrase, [normalize_light("خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ")]

cands = []
for v in quran:
    ayah = v['ayah_text']
    n = normalize_ar(ayah)
    if phrase in n:
        cands.append(v)
len(cands), [(c['surah_name'], c['surah_id'], c['ayah_id']) for c in cands[:10]]

cand = cands[0]
cand_text = [v for v in quran if v['surah_id']==cand['surah_id'] and v['ayah_id']==cand['ayah_id']][0]['ayah_text']
cand_text

def token_f1(s1, s2):
    t1 = normalize_ar(s1).split()
    t2 = normalize_ar(s2).split()
    inter = len(set(t1) & set(t2))
    p = inter / len(set(t1)) if t1 else 0
    r = inter / len(set(t2)) if t2 else 0
    f1 = 2*p*r/(p+r) if p+r else 0
    return f1, p, r, inter, set(t1), set(t2)

orig = orig_full
cand = cand_text
norm_lcs_ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=normalize_ar(orig), b=normalize_ar(cand)).ratio()
token_f1_score = token_f1(orig, cand)[0]
norm_lcs_ratio, token_f1_score
